chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1776 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15580/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15581/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. Petitioners are present in person. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is, inter alia, contended by the petitioners, who are present in person, that they have contracted a freewill marriage. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Saira is a divorcee and according to her, her former husband had divorced her six months back, whereafter she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on 06.10.2016, which has antagonized the family members of petitioner No.1. She further states that her parents have passed away longtime back. In this regard affidavit of freewill sworn by petitioner No.1 and nikahnama of both the petitioners are available on record as Annexures-A to C at pages 19, 21 and 23 respectively. In these circumstances, office is directed to issue notices to the private respondents through all modes except publication as well as notice to official respondents and A.A.G for 22.11.2016. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioners and official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if petitioners approach the official respondents for protection, the same should be provided to them in accordance with law. It is further directed that concerned SHO of P.S Shahdadpur (Hala Naka) will ensure presence of private respondents Amir Bux, Karim Bux, Pervaiz, Shahid and Rehmatullah before this Court on next date.

In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioners and official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if petitioners approach the official respondents for protection, the same should be provided to them in accordance with law. It is further directed that concerned SHO of P.S Shahdadpur (Hala Naka) will ensure presence of private respondents Amir Bux, Karim Bux, Pervaiz, Shahid and Rehmatullah before this Court on next date. In this regard concerned SSP shall issue necessary instructions. Copy of this order be forwarded to learned A.A.G as well as to the concerned SSP for compliance. JUDGE Ali Haider
